## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Jessica as a managing editor for GrowthX, focusing initially on editorial support for the Clerk client project.](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jessica will start with strictly editorial tasks, beginning with the Clerk client project](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Access issues to Okta and Google Drive were addressed; Jessica now has access to necessary platforms (Atlas, Notion, Google Drive)](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [The editing process involves reviewing AI-generated content in Atlas, then refining in Google Docs before client review](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Clerk is a high-priority client requiring extra editorial attention; CEO wants to review all content before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Initial Focus

  - [Jessica's role will start as strictly editorial, part of a larger managing editor position](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Initial focus: Editing content for Clerk, the first client she'll support](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Content expected to start coming in within the next day or two](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Jessica will support the implementation team, known as "strategy sprints"](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

### Platform Access and Familiarization

  - [Jessica gained access to Notion and Atlas (internal content generation platform)](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Google Drive access updated to use Jessica's GrowthX email](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Atlas contains client folders, artifacts, and content generation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Notion houses process documentation and strategy sprint information](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Clerk Client Specifics

  - [Clerk CEO wants to review all content before publication](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Currently not indexing blog content until they trust GrowthX's output](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Two more blogs to be generated for Clerk this week](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Jessica should review existing feedback and artifacts to understand client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

### Content Generation and Editing Process

  - [Content managers (CMs) generate articles in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Jessica will perform second-level editing in Google Docs after CM's first pass](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Clients see and review content in Google Docs, not in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Atlas pipeline shows steps, inputs, and generation times for each content piece](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)

### Team Collaboration and Evaluation

  - [Ada, the top Managing Editor (ME), will be on vacation next week](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Jessica will cover for Ada and receive a rundown from her this week](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Andi will develop evaluation criteria for Jessica's work, with a 2-3 week evaluation period](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to review Clerk materials in Atlas and Google Drive](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Familiarize with Clerk's pipeline, outputs, and previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Review artifacts in Atlas to understand client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Await first editing assignments (expected later this week)](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Andi to set up meeting between Jessica and Ada for process rundown](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Andi to develop and share evaluation criteria by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/Fz9khxoNTAy1wDjwgn_aB6MtcjR5imeJ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
